info.title: Official Information — LITON NETWORK
info.intro_after: team is actively developing the project with many major features in preparation.

about.title: About the project
about.text1: LITON NETWORK is an international collaborative initiative launched on March 21, 2024, aiming to build a solid, transparent and sustainable digital ecosystem.
about.text2: To consult the White Paper, the Roadmap, the Terms of Use and the Privacy Policy, please visit our official website.

communication.title: Official communication
communication.text1: All official information, updates and important announcements regarding LITON NETWORK are published exclusively via our official website and social media.
communication.text2: We invite you to always verify information through our official channels to avoid any confusion.

responsibility.title: User responsibility
responsibility.text1: Each user is responsible for the decisions and actions taken while using the LITON NETWORK application.
responsibility.text2: LITON NETWORK cannot be held responsible for losses, personal decisions, inappropriate or non-compliant uses made by users in the context of using the platform.
responsibility.text3: We invite all users to carefully read our Terms of Use and Privacy Policy, to respect the platform rules and to comply with the laws and regulations in force in their respective countries.

info.footer: Thank you for being part of the evolution of LITON NETWORK.
